g.title: container.biblio_record_entry_bucket_item:bucket->container.biblio_record_entry_bucket:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (bucket) REFERENCES container.biblio_record_entry_bucket(id) ON UPDATE CASCADE ON DELETE CASCADE DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED
